items.title: Republicans see a big opportunity in crowded Democratic primaries
items.description: In several states and swing districts, House Democrats have nomination contests that could prove harmful.

items.title: Much of DHS runs out of money after ICE negotiations falter
items.description: Democrats refused to fund the department without new restrictions on federal immigrations agents.

items.title: White House, RFK Jr. shake up health leadership after controversies
items.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s health department is undergoing a major leadership overhaul.

items.title: New images of White House ballroom show clearest look yet at Trump project

items.title: Trump tells soldiers to vote GOP in campaign-style rally at Fort Bragg
items.description: Army policy prohibits partisan displays, and most service members refrained from cheering.
